title: cephalocarpus comatus
intro: Cephalocarpus comatus, also known as the helmet plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Ranunculaceae, native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus comatus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
